codeReview.summary: The mount-time refresh in ReviewerTaskList now triggers the existing safe refresh helper on first render, which addresses the stale/empty inbox regression without changing reviewer action semantics.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit b399fd5, and current ReviewerTaskList/useUserStore refresh flow. The added onMounted refresh satisfies the intended fix for initial inbox loading, and I did not find blocking or non-blocking issues specific to this feature.
